accent_strategy.description: One precise vermilion alarm indicator suspended within the structural field.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A broad ultramarine slab occupying the right half as if the machine has become architecture.

historical_anchor.description: A solitary switch plate standing in for the silent system cues that organizations learn to ignore.
historical_anchor.topic: System signal reduced to one object

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Translate the console into a single monumental artifact with quiet industrial unease.

reflection_strategy.description: A lacquered mirrored floor band that turns clinical hardware into a calm reflective plane.

subject_anchor.description: A solitary switch plate reduced to a quiet relic-like object.

surreal_breach.description: The warning signal seems absorbed into the machine instead of remaining separate from it.
